overview.description: Prague-based AGI research lab building general artificial intelligence through LLM agents, swarm robotics, and AI in games
overview.description_long: GoodAI was founded in 2014 with a $10M personal investment by Marek Rosa with the mission to develop safe general artificial intelligence as fast as possible to help humanity and understand the universe. The company conducts fundamental AI research, advocates for AI research at the EU governmental level, and runs the GoodAI Grants program. Current focus areas include LLM agents equipped with Long-Term Memory (LTM), the Prometheus autonomous drone swarm project (LLM-driven, GPS-denied indoor flight), and the AI People game featuring AI-simulated characters. GoodAI also operates a commercial arm (GoodAI Applied, now spun out as GoodAI Solutions) focused on industrial AI solutions.
overview.tagline: Develop safe general artificial intelligence – as fast as possible – to help humanity and understand the universe.

history.origin_story: Founded in January 2014 by Marek Rosa, building on the success of his first company Keen Software House. Rosa personally invested $10M to pursue his lifelong dream of building general artificial intelligence.

key_milestones.event: GoodAI founded with $10M personal investment from Marek Rosa
R&D team grows to 20 researchers, scientists, and programmers; AI Roadmap Institute launched
General AI Challenge launched with $5M pledged in prize money to tackle AGI research problems
Human-Level AI 2018 multi-conference hosted by GoodAI
Badger Architecture published as unifying framework for modular lifelong learning
GoodAI Grants program launched with $300,000 pledged for external AI research projects
Co-hosted collective intelligence workshop at ICLR with Google Research and UCT Prague
Open-sourced GoodAI LTM Benchmark and Charlie Mnemonic (first LLM agent with Long-Term Memory)
Prometheus autonomous drone swarm project launched; AI People game developed

partnerships: University of Chemistry & Technology in Prague

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: GoodAI is an AGI research lab — they are building toward AGI rather than being displaced by it. Their research on Long-Term Memory for LLMs and autonomous drone swarms positions them as contributors to the foundation model ecosystem, not potential victims.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: The commercial opportunity for swarm robotics (Prometheus) is real and growing, particularly for defense/industrial GPS-denied environments. However, GoodAI's primary identity as a research lab means revenue generation is uncertain, and the company has pivoted focus multiple times (from pure AGI research to commercial AI solutions to drone swarms and games).
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: GoodAI is funded entirely by founder Marek Rosa's personal investment of $10M with no external VC funding. While Rosa is a successful entrepreneur (Keen Software House), reliance on a single founder's personal capital creates concentration risk. The GoodAI Grants program is currently closed to new applications, suggesting some financial conservatism.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: As a research-first organization with a single wealthy founder and no institutional funding, GoodAI faces sustainability questions. However, the Prometheus drone swarm project represents a tangible commercial opportunity with real defensibility (full-stack hardware + LLM software), and the team's deep AGI/LLM expertise is genuinely differentiated.

metadata.notes: GoodAI is sister company to Keen Software House (Space Engineers game developer), both founded by Marek Rosa. GoodAI Solutions is a commercial spin-off handling industrial AI (predictive maintenance, visual inspection). Glassdoor and LinkedIn were inaccessible due to login walls/anti-bot protection.
